Lucas Dewey
Experience Contact
Back to experience

2024-Present

Omnicell, Inc.

Senior Mechanical Design Engineer

Leading mechanical design and R&D for next-generation medical hardware platforms, spanning secure access systems, subsystem packaging, and platform-level mechanical improvements from concept through validation and ECO release.

Location SF Bay Area, CA

Highlights

  • Supporting medical hardware platform development through mechanical design updates, prototyping, and product-line improvements.
  • Owning trade studies and DFM/DFA-focused design across injection molded, sheet metal, and weldment components.
  • Delivering serviceable, field-retrofittable hardware solutions designed for medical-grade reliability, security, and real-world durability.

Tools

SolidWorksAgile PLMInjection moldingSheet metal designWeldment designDFM/DFAPrototypingDesign validationECO management

Projects

Work at Omnicell, Inc.

Project

Access Control Mechanism Development

Developed a compact access-control concept for a medical hardware application, focused on security, reliability, and integration within a constrained mechanical envelope.

Contribution

  • Owned concept generation, trade studies, prototyping, and design validation.
  • Evaluated multiple sensing and actuation approaches to identify a robust solution for the application.
  • Worked through tight packaging, reliability, security, manufacturability, and serviceability constraints.

Result

Downselected and validated a concept suitable for continued platform development.

Project

Medical Device Platform Mechanical Improvements

Contributed to mechanical design updates for a medical hardware platform, focusing on durable, manufacturable, and serviceable cabinet-level components.

Contribution

  • Designed production parts and assemblies using SolidWorks, with emphasis on DFM, DFA, and field serviceability.
  • Supported engineering change workflows across complex product structures and released updates through PLM processes.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional engineering and service stakeholders to address real-world product needs.

Result

Helping deliver robust platform improvements suitable for production deployment and long-term field support.
